{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>
<NOTE>6. Bey Herrn Haag an der Augustinergasse sind zu verkauffen:</NOTE>
<BIBL><TITLE>Prideaun A. und N. Testam</TITLE>, in einer Connex. mit der Völcker-Historie, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE> <YEAR>1725</YEAR>. <VOLUME>II. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME> † <NOTE>Cattenburg</NOTE></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>. <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Bibl.</TITLE> <VOLUME>8r. 70.</VOLUME> <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Bibl. Hebr.</TITLE> von <AUTHOR>punctata Leusdenii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Frf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1694</YEAR>. <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>. <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1692</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Gottschedens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Büdickers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Grundsätze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>, <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT></BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":10,"explanation":"1. Wrapped introductory text in <NOTE> tag for structural clarity. 2. Corrected character encoding (mojibake) throughout (e.g., Augustinergasse, Völcker, Büdickers, Grundsätze, 8vo). 3. Fixed incorrect nesting of <BIBL> elements; all entries are now siblings instead of children of the second entry. 4. Renamed semantic error <PRIZE> to <NOTE> as 'Cattenburg' is not a price. 5. Corrected OCR error '1I' to 'II' in Volume information. 6. Escaped ampersand in XML content."}

<ITEM>
<NOTE>6. Bey Herrn Haag an der Augustinergasse sind zu verkauffen:</NOTE>
<BIBL><TITLE>Prideaun A. und N. Testam</TITLE>, in einer Connex. mit der Völcker-Historie, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE> <YEAR>1725</YEAR>. <VOLUME>II. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME> † <NOTE>Cattenburg</NOTE></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>. <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Bibl.</TITLE> <VOLUME>8r. 70.</VOLUME> <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Bibl. Hebr.</TITLE> von <AUTHOR>punctata Leusdenii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Frf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1694</YEAR>. <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>. <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1692</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Gottschedens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Büdickers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Grundsätze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>, <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT></BIBL>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. Wrapped introductory text in <NOTE> tag for structural clarity. 2. Corrected character encoding (mojibake) throughout (e.g., Augustinergasse, Völcker, Büdickers, Grundsätze, 8vo). 3. Fixed incorrect nesting of <BIBL> elements; all entries are now siblings instead of children of the second entry. 4. Renamed semantic error <PRIZE> to <NOTE> as 'Cattenburg' is not a price. 5. Corrected OCR error '1I' to 'II' in Volume information. 6. Escaped ampersand in XML content.
